GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "Hardy Brothers's Quintessential collection makes for luxury gifting", "Comprised of timeless pieces that display exquisite craftsmanship, the Quintessential collection puts an elevated Hardy Brothers spin on the classics. The result? Gifts that are affordable, luxe, and highly covetable.", "With the holiday season fast approaching, now is the time to begin dropping hints – if you haven't already been doing so for the last ten months. Whether it's the subtle Instagram scroll within your partner's eyesight, to the less discrete email with hyperlinks included, when it comes to the gift of jewellery only one name should be on your list: Hardy Brothers. If owning a piece of the company's coveted jewellery is your desire, you're not alone. Founded in 1853, Hardy Brothers has since built a reputation for pieces that reflect the ambitions of the founder, John Hardy; to produce the rarest and most sought after jewellery in the country. Not surprisingly, the company is regarded as Australia's leading jeweller and has been commissioned to create bespoke designs for royalty, politicians and celebrities. While this may conjure images of unattainable luxury, The Quintessential collections offer every-day diamond pieces, playful pops of colour with pink tourmaline and aquamarine, all to the standard of quality that has come to be expected from Hardy Brothers. Hardy Brothers draw on contemporary designs, but with quality craftsmanship that sets them apart from the rest. Through an assemblage of semi-precious gemstones and diamonds ready to be artfully layered to capture your own style, the collection oozes modern glamour and a cheerful sophistication at an attractive price point. But sometimes the price is simply a footnote to commemorating a special milestone. If that's the unique position you find yourself in, look no further than the Vault collection. Representing Hardy Brothers commitment to master craftsmanship, innovation and pursuit of perfection, the Vault Collection is a place where fine jewellery is transformed into rare objects d'art. The collection is available to view by private appointment only. Regardless of who you might be buying for this holiday season, the gift of Hardy Brothers jewellery will be treasured for a lifetime. With a range of jewellery to suit all budgets or those of us with no budget, a gift from Hardy Brothers will make for a magical Christmas."
